meta.title: A Flight in the Air Force's Most Advanced Trainer
meta.description:
The Air Force has taken the Navy's T-6B and supercharged it into the most advanced trainer in the world. Today I got a chance to fly in one.

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

How to connect:
Podcast: https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/hasardlee
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/hasardlee/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/hasardlee

📷 Josh Hak. IG--https://www.instagram.com/joshua_hak/
Thumbnail 📸: Greg L. Davis. IG--https://www.instagram.com/cactusinburner/

*Approved and adheres to AFI 1-1, USAF Social Media Policy*


*Opinions are mine and mine alone and do not represent the United States Air Force or any other organization*
